name: TV Logos
description: Automatically enriches channel logos from the open-source tv-logo/tv-logos repository via the jsDelivr CDN.

settings.label: Source & Target
settings.description: Logo source repository and playlist assignment.

fields.label: GitHub Repository (owner/repo)
fields.helper_text: GitHub repository for logo files. Change to use a fork, e.g. your-username/tv-logos.

fields.label: Default Playlist(s)
fields.helper_text: Playlists to enrich automatically after each sync. Leave empty to disable automatic enrichment.

fields.label: Country Code (e.g. us, gb, de, fr)

settings.label: Matching Behavior
settings.description: Controls for overwriting, VOD handling, and cache lifetime.

fields.label: Overwrite channels that already have a logo
Match cache TTL in days (0 = never expire)

settings.label: Channel Name Normalization
settings.description: Normalize channel names before matching against the logo repository.

fields.label: Normalize channel names before matching
fields.helper_text: Enable to clean up channel names before logo matching. Configure individual rules below.

fields.label: Strip unicode special characters (², ³, ʀᴀᴡ, etc.)
fields.helper_text: Remove superscripts, subscripts, and small-caps unicode characters.

fields.label: Strip 'raw' from quality tags (HDraw → HD)
fields.helper_text: Remove 'raw' suffix from quality indicators like HDraw, FHDraw, UHDraw.

fields.label: Strip provider/transport terms from channel names
fields.helper_text: Remove provider or transport identifiers (e.g. Cable, IPTV) that are not part of the channel name. Configure the terms to strip in the field below.

fields.label: Provider/transport terms to strip (one per line)
fields.default:
Cable
IPTV
Terrestrial
DVB-T
DVB-T2
DVB-C
DVB-S
DVB-S2
fields.helper_text: Terms matched as whole words (case-insensitive) and removed from channel names. Add provider-specific terms for your setup, e.g. Sat, Kabel, Astra — but check first that they don't clash with actual channel names.

fields.label: Strip extra quality descriptors (Low, High, etc.)
fields.helper_text: Remove Low/High when appended to a quality tag (e.g. HD Low → HD, UHD High → UHD).

fields.label: Custom normalization patterns (one regex per line)
fields.helper_text: Advanced: custom regex patterns to remove from channel names. One pattern per line, applied in order.

fields.label: Overwrite channels that already have a logo
